title: Burden of disease of RSV in infants, children and pregnant women and people - Supplemental - Canada.ca
content:
## Burden of disease of RSV in infants, children and pregnant persons - Supplemental
- Information for authors
Volume 50-1/2, January/February 2024: Burden of disease of RSV
Burden of disease of respiratory syncytial virus in infants, young children and pregnant women and people—Supplemental material
Elissa Abrams, Pamela Doyon-Plourde,  Phaedra Davis, Nicholas Brousseau, Andrea Irwin,  Winnie Siu, April Killikelly

### Supplemental material S1
Search strategy of systematic reviews on medically attended  respiratory syncytial virus or on respiratory syncytial virus infection in  infants and young children.
- Table S1: Search strategy for Medline database(s), Ovid MEDLINE(R) ALL 1946 to April 05, 2023
- Table S2:  Search strategy for Embase database(s), Embase 1974 to April 05,  2023
- Table S3:  Search strategy for Global Health database(s), Global Health 1973 to  2023 Week 13

#### Search strategy  for ProQuest Public Health: 56 results
(mesh(Respiratory  Syncytial Virus Infection/) OR noft(respiratory syncytial vir* OR RSV OR hrsv)  OR noft((respiratory syncytial AND (rsv OR hrsv)))) AND (mesh(exp pediatrics/  OR exp infant/ OR child health/ OR exp child/ OR exp adolescent/ OR adolescent health/)  OR (infan* or newborn* or new* born* or neonat* or baby or babies or toddler*  or boy* or girl* or juvenile* or adolescen* or preadolescen* or preschool* or  tween* or preteen* or adrenarch* or child or children or childhood or daughter*  or kid? or menarch* or paediatric* or pediatric* or perinatal or preadrenarch*  or premenarch* or prepubert* or prepubescen* or pubert* or pubescen* or school  age? or son or sons or stepchild* or stepdaughter* or stepson* or teen* or  young* or youth*)) AND (mesh(exp hospital/ OR exp hospitalization/ OR child  hospitalization/ OR exp health care facility/ OR hospital admission/ OR exp  hospital care/ OR exp primary health care/ OR patient care/ OR exp primary  health care/ OR patient care/ OR hospital department/ OR health care facility/  OR ambulance/ OR artificial ventilation/ OR exp morbidity/ OR exp death/ OR exp  mortality/) OR noft(hospital* OR ambulan* OR intensive care unit? OR icu OR  (emergency NEAR/1 (room? OR department? OR ward? OR medical services)) OR  emergency medical* OR “EMS” OR paramedic? OR inpatient? OR ((med* NEAR/1 evac*)  OR medevac*) OR ((mechanical* OR artificial*) NEAR/2 ventil*) OR ventilator* OR  mortal* OR lethal* OR death* OR dead* OR die OR dies OR died OR dying OR  fatal)) AND (MESH(meta-analysis) or MESH(systematic review) or  MESH(meta-analysis as topic) or MESH(systematic review as topic) OR  TITLE((systematic* NEAR/3 (review* or overview*)) or (methodologic* NEAR/3  (review* or overview*))) OR ABSTRACT((systematic* NEAR/3 (review* or  overview*)) or (methodologic* NEAR/3 (review* or overview*))) OR  TITLE((quantitative NEAR/3 (review* or overview* or synthes*)) or (research  NEAR/3 (integrati* or overview*))) OR ABSTRACT((quantitative NEAR/3 (review* or  overview* or synthes*)) or (research NEAR/3 (integrati* or overview*))) OR  TITLE(meta analy* or metanaly*) OR ABSTRACT(meta analy* or metanaly*) OR  TITLE(comparative NEAR/3 (efficacy or effectiveness)) OR ABSTRACT(comparative  NEAR/3 (efficacy or effectiveness)))

### Supplemental  material S2
Search strategy of primary evidence on medically attended  respiratory syncytial virus or on respiratory syncytial virus infection in  pregnant women and people.
- Table S4:  Search strategy for Medline database(s), Ovid MEDLINE(R) ALL 1946 to  April 10, 2023
- Table S5:  Search strategy for Embase database(s), Embase 1974 to April 07,  2023
- Table S6:  Search strategy for Global Health database(s), Global Health 1973 to  2023 Week 14

#### Search strategy  for ProQuest Public Health: 142 results
((mesh(Respiratory  Syncytial Virus Infections) OR (respiratory syncytial vir* OR RSV OR hrsv)) AND  PEER(yes)) AND ((mesh(pregnancy OR pregnancy complications OR pregnant women OR  maternal exposure OR fetus) OR title(pregnan* OR trimester* OR interconception*  OR preconception* OR conception* OR prenatal* OR perinatal* OR postnatal OR  intrauterine* OR fetal* OR foetal* OR zygot* OR embryo* OR placent* OR  amniotic* OR umbilical OR fertility OR fecund* OR (expect* NEAR/2 (mother* OR  parent*)) OR obstetric*)) AND PEER(yes)) AND ((mesh(exp hospitals OR  hospitalization OR Health Facilities OR hospital admission OR hospital care OR  Primary Health Care OR exp patient care OR exp primary health care OR exp  hospital departments OR health facilities OR ambulatory care facilities OR exp  Respiration, Artificial OR exp Morbidity OR exp Death OR exp Mortality) OR  noft(hospital* OR ambulan* OR intensive care unit? OR icu OR emergency room? OR  emergency department? OR emergency ward? OR emergency medical* OR “EMS” OR  paramedic? OR inpatient? OR mechanical ventil* OR mortal* OR lethal* OR death*  OR dead* OR die OR dies OR died OR dying OR fatal)) AND PEER(yes))

#### Results Limited  to Systematic Review: 18 results
(((mesh(Respiratory  Syncytial Virus Infections) OR (respiratory syncytial vir* OR RSV OR hrsv)) AND  PEER(yes)) AND ((mesh(pregnancy OR pregnancy complications OR pregnant women OR  maternal exposure OR fetus) OR title(pregnan* OR trimester* OR interconception*  OR preconception* OR conception* OR prenatal* OR perinatal* OR postnatal OR  intrauterine* OR fetal* OR foetal* OR zygot* OR embryo* OR placent* OR  amniotic* OR umbilical OR fertility OR fecund* OR (expect* NEAR/2 (mother* OR  parent*)) OR obstetric*) OR subject(pregnan* OR trimester* OR interconception*  OR preconception* OR conception* OR prenatal* OR perinatal* OR postnatal OR  intrauterine* OR fetal* OR foetal* OR zygot* OR embryo* OR placent* OR  amniotic* OR umbilical OR fertility OR fecund* OR (expect* NEAR/2 (mother* OR  parent*)) OR obstetric*)) AND PEER(yes)) AND ((mesh(exp hospitals OR  hospitalization OR Health Facilities OR hospital admission OR hospital care OR  Primary Health Care OR exp patient care OR exp primary health care OR exp  hospital departments OR health facilities OR ambulatory care facilities OR exp  Respiration, Artificial OR exp Morbidity OR exp Death OR exp Mortality) OR  noft(hospital* OR ambulan* OR intensive care unit? OR icu OR emergency room? OR  emergency department? OR emergency ward? OR emergency medical* OR “EMS” OR  paramedic? OR inpatient? OR mechanical ventil* OR mortal* OR lethal* OR death*  OR dead* OR die OR dies OR died OR dying OR fatal)) AND PEER(yes))) AND  (mesh(meta-analysis OR systematic review OR meta-analysis as topic OR  systematic review as topic) OR noft((systematic* NEAR/3 (review* OR overview*))  OR (methodologic* NEAR/3 (review* OR overview*)) OR (comparative NEAR/3  (efficacy OR effectiveness))))
